subject: Rename releases files for el alto release
commit_message:

Issue-ID: OPTFRA-580

Signed-off-by: Jerry Flood <jflood@att.com>

Patch Set 1:

Jess, can you please advise -- it seems like we aren't allowed to rename files ?

Patch Set 1:

Hi Jerry, we mentioned this in the wiki too.. 

We do not allow re-name or changes into the already existing release files. 
Please create a new one if needed.
